name: io.github.webberdesign/webbersites-x402-mcp
description: 41 pay-per-call AI agent tools + a wallet-owned persistent datastore — give your agent a memory. Scraping, SEO audits, brand kits & more. USDC via x402, $0.001-$0.009.

environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x… private key of a dedicated hot wallet holding USDC on Base mainnet; each tool call pays for itself. Omit to run in quote mode (tools return prices and payment requirements instead of data).

environmentVariables.name: X402_MAX_PRICE
environmentVariables.description: Maximum USD price per call; more expensive tools are refused before any payment. Default 0.50 (ample headroom — prices currently range $0.001-$0.009); lower it to cap spend harder.
